error_signature: Airtable not updating with new order data
title: Airtable not updating records correctly
symptom: After running the workflow, Airtable shows 58 orders instead of the expected 14, indicating that new records are being added instead of updating existing ones.
applies_when: Running a workflow that creates orders
not_this_if: Airtable is empty before running the workflow
Using a different method to update records
root_cause: The workflow is configured to create new records in Airtable each time it runs, rather than updating existing records. This leads to duplicate entries instead of refreshing the existing data.
fix_steps: Change the operation to 'Create or Update'
Save the workflow and run it again
agent_instruction: Change the Airtable node to use 'Create or Update' with 'order_id' as the match field.
